regional_cost_note: Plumbers in New Plymouth typically charge $90–$120/hr plus GST. Naki Plumbing charges a $120+GST call-out fee plus a minimum one-hour labour charge. Emergency and after-hours work adds $100–$200. Look for PGDB-registered certifying plumbers for compliance work on gas and new installations.

businesses.name: Verve Plumbing Services
businesses.known_for: Owner-operator Carlin Lepper with 10+ years residential and light commercial experience; praised for responsiveness and meticulous workmanship.

businesses.name: Hanover Plumbing & Gas
businesses.known_for: Trusted Master Plumber serving Taranaki since 2015; 24/7 emergency service with CCTV drain cameras, hot water systems and gas appliance servicing.

businesses.name: Ariki Plumbing
businesses.known_for: Family-owned plumbers, gasfitters and drainlayers; known for prompt communication, fair pricing and quality kitchen and bathroom work.

businesses.name: How Good Plumbing
businesses.known_for: Small family-run team; lead plumber Isaac has 14+ years experience in shower and bath installs, gas conversions and blocked drain clearing.

businesses.name: Savvygas Taranaki
businesses.known_for: Taranaki-wide specialists in plumbing, gasfitting, drainage and heating; retail showroom in Stratford for heating and hot water product selection.

businesses.name: Cortina Plumbing
businesses.known_for: Over 15 years serving New Plymouth; specialises in gas fitting, hot water system replacements, drainage and residential maintenance.

businesses.name: Naki Plumbing and Gas
businesses.known_for: Transparent published fee structure; local Taranaki specialists covering plumbing, gas fitting and drainlaying for residential clients.

businesses.name: Straight Flush Plumbing
businesses.known_for: 20 years' industry experience covering plumbing, gas fitting, drain laying and roofing; well-reviewed on Builderscrack for professional and friendly service.

businesses.name: Laser Plumbing New Plymouth
businesses.known_for: Part of the national Laser Plumbing franchise; 25+ years serving Taranaki after Gardiner Plumbing joined the Laser network in late 2024.

businesses.name: Chesters Plumbing
businesses.known_for: Established local New Plymouth plumbers serving residential and commercial clients across Taranaki.
